review_title: GanttPro improved my project management
description: When it comes to managing several projects and spreadsheets, GanttPRO has been invaluable to me as a knowledgeable and professional-based platform.
author: Maddie B.
pros: GanttPro's intuitive design is one of its most notable qualities. Even though I don't come from a project management background, I had no trouble learning how to utilize it. Using the simple drag-and-drop interface, you can quickly and easily create a Gantt chart, timeline, and task dependencies.
cons: While the UI is simple and straightforward to use, it does not allow for any personalization. It's hard to work with and lacks fluidity in terms of page layout and design.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy to use and affordable option
description: So far we think this is the most suitable Gantt Chart alternative to MS Project and we look forward to working with it.
author: Keith R.
pros: I like that this is an affordable alternative to MS Projects. It really enables our non-profit organization to run our projects smoothly without having to pay astronomical fees associated with MS Projects.
cons: We are based in the UK which have different calendar formats so it would be good to see an option to change styles in the calendar format and to be able to pay in GBP.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Simplify Your Workflows and Drive Results
description: Overall, using GanttPRO can be a positive experience for businesses looking to simplify their project management processes. The platform's intuitive and user-friendly interface, improved collaboration and communication features, and customizable templates can help teams save time and achieve better results. However, like any technology solution, GanttPRO may have a learning curve for some users and may not be suitable for businesses with complex or specialized project management needs. Before investing in GanttPRO, it's important to thoroughly evaluate the benefits and drawbacks to ensure that it meets your specific requirements and expectations.
author: Sarfaraz K.
pros: GanttPRO offers several benefits to businesses looking to simplify their project management processes. Some of the key advantages of using GanttPRO include:Intuitive and user-friendly interfaceImproved collaboration and communication between team membersCustomizable project templates and real-time reportingIntegration with popular tools such as Google Drive, Trello, and SlackAdvanced Gantt chart capabilities for comprehensive project planning and management.By streamlining workflows and improving collaboration and communication, GanttPRO helps teams achieve better results in less time. Whether you're looking to manage small projects or large-scale initiatives, GanttPRO is a versatile and powerful solution that can help you meet your goals.
cons: One potential drawback is that it may have a learning curve for users unfamiliar with project management tools. Additionally, the platform's features and capabilities may be limited for businesses with highly complex or specialized project management needs. Finally, some users may find the cost of GanttPRO to be a concern, especially for smaller or cost-conscious organizations. Before making a decision on whether GanttPRO is the right solution for your business, it's important to thoroughly evaluate the benefits and drawbacks to ensure that it meets your specific needs and requirements.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Off to a great start
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great tool for project management. The ease of set-up makes starting a project a breeze. I am exciting to use the project duplication feature soon.
cons: Getting use to the visual layout took a bit of learning. There are also a lot more features than currently suit our needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: GanttPro helps with workload and schedule planning across multiple projects
description: Good. It has features that other project management tools don't have - the workload and multi-project features in particular.
author: Alastair N.
pros: The Portfolio and workload features are the most useful for my team. We have multiple projects and these help us plan workload and deadlines months ahead.
cons: It doesn't have an app for my Mac. I don't find it that intuitive to use to begin with, e.g., finding and filtering current tasks by start date, or deadline, or priority is not that easy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ganttpro is great for R&D project management
description: Overall Ganttpro meets all my needs for managing multiples R&D projects.
author: Jean B.
pros: Ganttpro is very easy to use compared to my actual tool! There are a lot of powerful features: -budget with hour rate for each member; -member workload; -project baseline; -board view; -chat is possible in each task; -etc. Also, I like that all my projects are at the same place;
cons: The IOS app is limited; The integration with Teams is limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Powerful features and easy to use
description: This is a beautifully designed and very helpful piece of software that we anticipate will save our team a ton of time spinning up project schedules and estimates.
author: Kate L.
pros: The interface was very intuitive. I was able to spin up a project schedule quickly and make adjustments easily. The visuals are attractive and make the information easier to digest. It's affordably priced and customer service has been very responsive and helpful with any questions that have come up! The Workload and Estimation features are going to save our team a lot of time! We also love the Link Share feature - having multiple shared links to different views/filters is really awesome!
cons: We wish there was a Quickbooks integration - our invoices are directly connected to our team's time. There was a little bit of a learning curve for our team who was used to Smartsheet, but as we get more comfortable we are liking it more and more!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: GanttPRO: A powerful, easy-to-use Gantt chart tool without unnecessary overhead
description: I used the test license to find out if we can use GanttPRO for our purposes. What helped a lot was a support team that would answer questions real FAST (sometimes within a few minutes!). I was able to get up to speed with GanttPRO within three weeks, and it works well for planning our development projects in a large team of engineers. I checked out other tools as well, but most of them had a serious show stopper or were lacking important features. That's why we chose GanttPRO
author: Dr. Rüdiger B.
pros: GanttPRO is an easy to use Gantt chart that allows for easy managing our development projects in a large team of engineers. It allows for a good resource management as well. Much better than any other tool I checked.
cons: There are a few minor(!) wishes for additional features that I told GanttPRO, and I hope the GanttPRO team may add them at some point in the future. But none of those is a show stopper.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great user interface
description: I love gantt chart and GanttPRO enables to easily work with it.
author: Fernando H.
pros: The user interface is ease to edit the chart and with a few clicks you can plan all you need.
cons: The smartphone app is limited; you cannot work with Gantt chart.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: GanttPRO Review
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a student working on an Automated Guided Vehicle (AGV) research project at the University of Cambridge, I’ve found GanttPRO to be an outstanding tool for planning and managing our workflow. Our project involves multiple parallel tasks—mechanical design, control algorithm development, sensor integration, and testing—and GanttPRO has made it easy to keep everything organized and transparent for the entire team. Its clean interface, intuitive task-dependency setup, and real-time collaboration features have been especially helpful during busy academic weeks. Being able to visualize deadlines and adjust timelines quickly has reduced our stress and kept the project on track. For anyone managing a complex university project, I’d highly recommend GanttPRO.
cons: If I had to highlight something I liked least about GanttPRO, it would probably be the limited customization for certain views. While the interface is clean and easy to use, there were moments during our AGV project when I wished I could tailor the dashboard a bit more—especially to display technical milestones in a more engineering-focused layout. It wasn’t a major issue, but having deeper control over how information is presented would have made coordination even smoother.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Student Review
description: My overall experience using Gantt Pro has been wonderful. l like color, and this website just made it easy; my tutors have been asking about this website because of its user experience and interface.
author: Haniya M.
pros: I like the easiness of using the Gantt chart in Gantt Pro, l have used other websites as well, but l felt this was the easiest one, and l like the different coloring systems of Gantt Pro.
cons: there is nothing i don't like about Gantt pro

pros: There are many that I have liked from what I have been using GanttPRO, but to highlight I have the ease of use, here I can organize my tasks easily, have a fairly easy follow-up, I can export to an excel that is even better and I can have it all very close to the palm of my hand, Besides this I also love the way it presents the tasks in the gantt chart that although many people think that any application does it in my case I did not have good luck with any application as I am having with this one, super recommended and I hope to continue from here on until I graduate to continue using it.
cons: So far I haven't found anything I don't like since I have found everything I needed, as I am just learning how to manage projects and the good use of an application to keep track. I can say that of all the applications I have used this is the best without a doubt.

description: I was introduced to Gantt pro at a prior job, and now it is essential to how I plan design projects!

review_title: Very useful and easy to use
description: Overall, I am highly satisfied with GanttPRO.
author: Maria Carolina L.
pros: GanttPRO offers a highly intuitive user interface, making project planning a breeze with its seamless Gantt chart functionality. Making changes, adjusting tasks, time, effort, and precedencies during the planning phase is effortless, further enhancing its user-friendly nature. Moreover, its diverse customization options offer a clear overview of project milestones. While I couldn't explore all features during the trial period, I am convinced it's an outstanding tool for process and project management
cons: Presently, I require the program for academic purposes, which is why I find the trial period insufficient and the pricing slightly steep for this specific use case.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Gantt Pro is fantastic
description: My overall experience was 10/10, a grade A experience, as you can see, I only had pros and no real cons. It does exactly what I wanted it to, and very well, as I said in the pros, the customization in terms of colors and shapes of tasks, the export function is great should I want an image of my chart, which I've used on several occasions. Whenever I create a chart using GanttPro, it always ends up being a good project, due to GanttPro doing it's best to make sure I stay on schedule, I really loved my experience.
author: ﹒ Dovi K.
pros: I mostly used this product to create Gantt charts, which is really does a fantastic job at. Between the different customization of colors, shapes and task types, and as well as exporting to PDF/ XML/ Excel/ PNG features, which come in handy, should you want to work outside of GanttPro's system with other team members. I also loved the way it tracks your progress really well, making sure, I'm always on schedule when it comes to finishing my projects on time. TL;DR if you need to create a Gantt Chart, look no further because you've arrived at your destination.I really don't have much bad to say about this great project. It really just feels smooth and professional.
cons: I can't say that there was much about Gantt I didn't like, everything was great and it worked just as I expected it to and how I wanted it to.

review_title: GanttPRO realy made program management easy
description: Great experience with the business case I used for the demo. I also used it in the Google Program Management certification. It became a necessary tool to keep track of the projects.
author: Juan Carlos C.
pros: Software as a service, no need to install any software at all. Can be used whether an operating system or device is being used.Easy to use interface, guidelines, and supporting material are fantastic.The ability to share and work in real-time with teammates, colleagues, and stakeholders.
cons: Can't export the projects to a Microsoft project file (MPP) or couldn't find the option. I suppose this is a by-design limitation to increase the number of people using the platform. But in a real scenario, you work with several teams, outside an organization and they will definitely use MS Project, it was very hard to keep up with the changes in this scenario.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: From chaos to order: The power of GanttPro on project managing
description: Definitely, planning, tracking, and overall project management have become easier, more efficient, and better since I started using GanttPro. As I mentioned before, it has helped me design and keep track of project timelines, activities, and their status. It has also facilitated team communication since everyone knows their responsibilities, for example.
author: Sebastián S.
pros: My job as a project manager for a psychotherapists' company has led me to discover new tools to manage the projects I've been working on. That's how I found GanttPro, and I can honestly say it's a lifesaver. I believe that, with the current surge of technological advancements, especially in app development, there have to be better, easier ways to do the work, and this tool definitely does that. I used to spend countless hours working on Excel sheets, doing something that GanttPro helps me accomplish faster, cleaner, and overall better. It has significantly improved my planning and monitoring capabilities. It's visually attractive and comprehensive, and it has even allowed me to collaborate with my team. Without a doubt, I would recommend it if you are looking for a reliable solution for project management.
cons: I believe GanttPro is quite good. Fortunately, I haven't encountered many problems along the way. Perhaps the most difficult part was inviting my team to leave their old ways behind and try it, especially since there are some old-schoolers among them. However, the interactive and user-friendly platform allowed them to become proficient without much trouble.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The finest platforms for using the gantt chart template to work schedule and allocate tasks
description: So I could better explain their projects and tell them of developments, he helped me illustrate the work programs for different clients in a bar chart manner. And all of this utilizes basic technology offered by GanttPRO for a modest fee via a website, without the need for complicated processes and programs that are difficult to master and explain to clients. It will also help me clarify the work plans for their projects and tell them of updates.
author: Ahmad A.
pros: I admire the ability of GanttPRO to distribute responsibilities precisely and clearly to our team members, which is a great method to handle projects. The Gantt chart template offers everyone more attention and makes them eager to complete the activity on time. I particularly like GanttPRO's ready-made templates that allow me and the team to quickly develop their plans. In addition, I enjoy how updates are done on the baseline work schedule and the exact results that can be retrieved from those updates that let you know which activities are progressing according to plan and which are overdue.
cons: It's easy to use, has a nice user interface, and once logged in, you can work directly, save and share modifications with peers. This will allow you to start a new project and share it with the team, as well as update existing ones.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Excellent for project management in research laboratories
description: We're using GanttPro to streamline our research projects from experimental planning and budgeting to results sharing and manuscript writing. Because lab meetings are more mostly online these days we found ourselves needing an online platform to better organize and share plans, progress, and timelines between lab members, and GanttPro does this perfectly for us. It's also been useful in tracking our activity as a lab, we're learning from our timelines how to more efficiently organize our projects and people. It makes our lab meetings shorter and more productive.
author: Meghan R.
pros: We use GanttPRO in our research lab and found that organizing our experimental projects into tasks and subtasks with corresponding timelines makes reporting and sharing progress at lab meetings more efficient. Additionally, the ability to attach reports or files within each task makes it easy to share and discuss data at meetings. We use it to catalogue events such as acquisition of new samples. Our lab is benefitting from being able to map out experiments using the timeline, and the dependency features make it easy to adjust plans and see where the bottlenecks could be. Being able to integrate our projects into one space and track them in real time has also been a great help in understanding how the workload and expenses are distributed in our lab.
cons: The scroller bars for moving the window view in the new updated version are just slightly too skinny for my taste, it's taking some getting used to.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Plan your Project NOWWW!
description: Overall, GanttPRO offers more than the money one can spend on it. It is efficient and makes project management easy and more comfortable.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I can start project planning easily, and update the progress of the project in real time. I can collaborate with my colleagues and modify the plan according to the development. It is very efficient and easy to keep trak of different projects at a time. Also it provides best privacy.
cons: To be honest, GanttPRO is best solution for project management but its important to learn and take lessons to become pro in project management.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Distinguished capabilities that increase the interaction of team members with workflow plans
description: With GanttPRO's powerful capabilities, we are able to organize and assign workflows to team members, as well as streamline communication between team members when updates are made or when they ask for help.
author: Anurup M.
pros: GanttPRO is distinguished by its presence on the cloud, and it does not need special settings for use, as it is considered a large page, enabling us to cooperate with each other to prepare and organize the flow of operations and tasks in the multiple projects that we follow in the Gantt style, which I consider the most successful project follow-up systems, for its capabilities to discover the critical path and overlapping activities By doing, enabling us to always develop proactive solutions. I love using the cards, boards and lists that GanttPRO provides to help us manage project tasks, and enjoy the flexibility that GanttPRO provides, with which we can customize these boards to suit our needs. I love the fact that creating workflow diagrams and dashboards for teams and departments is so simple. I love how colors are added to a Gantt chart so that each one represents a specific topic or a critical task, as the colors make it easy for us to manage the workflow in an interactive way. I love how a colleague is asked for help to make updates to one of the panels, and I love how we can integrate all the panels For colleagues, presenting its work plan and its achievement summary, which enables us to explore the actual business reality of the project.
cons: GanttPRO is easy to use, low in cost and enables us to add additional users easily, and I like the fact that I haven't experienced any negatives or encountered any issues while using it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: GanttPRO has been a game-changer for us
description: Wrapping up, GanttPRO has been a standout tool for us. It's streamlined our process, given us killer forecasting abilities, and is just overall easy to use. We're pretty excited about where it's headed and totally recommend it to anyone looking to get their project management on point.
author: Gustavo P.
pros: Especially since we're juggling so many projects with not enough hands on deck. Its design is user-friendly, and it's packed with features that have really kicked our project management skills up a notch. We're talking about keeping things organized and nailing our goals and predictions. What's really cool about GanttPRO is how easy it is to use. It makes the whole scheduling and tracking gig a breeze, so we can spend more time doing great work instead of getting tangled up in complicated software. Seeing our project timelines, what depends on what, and how everything's moving along in real-time is a big win. It gives us a clear picture of where we're at and helps us make smart moves ahead of time.
cons: Possibilities to improve the fine tuning of task and other options that could improve adaptability to users' needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
